title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Queen, Luffy as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: upon

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Capture straw hat Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: picture the Haki...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: flowing through your body.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Buh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnh4! That's not it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kyah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No! But...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look at all these opponents

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I can practice on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm going to get this down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're tough as nails, straw hat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What should we do, chop- paemon?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've gotta go save 0-lin!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who cares about that! I'm calm now that she's gone!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides, we need to back up Luffy first! Whyis He not running?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Head Jailer! Should we throw the prisoners back into their cells before they can start any trouble?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No need.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Pris- Oners!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Your friend, Luffftaro, is running amok!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Use your strength to hold him down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huuuh?! Why would the-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Uwagh! Stop that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm on your side, guys! Don't you want to get out of here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Gerroff me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I mean... of course we've got grudges!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: seen' you fight back like that... it brought a smile to our faces. No doubt.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But... where are we going to run to? Kaido and Orochi control all of wano.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Twenty years ago,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We fought to avenge the death of Lord Open Kozuki!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But, at the hands of the pirate Kaido...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: PAOPAO PAPAPA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We lost our friends and family! We were bruised, beaten and broken!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the sight of Lord Yasuie's execution just now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It brought back a despair we'd all thought we'd forgotten...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if we make it out of here, we have no homes to return to. No food to eat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's not a scrap of soil in this country on which we'll ever be free!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're just some foreign outsider! You can fight and run

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All you want! Just keep us out of it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is he doing?! Lord Daffugo has fired his guns!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So... Hot! My body's burning! Save me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi! What's the matter! Wait, what's this weird bruise on his neck?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's burning up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hahahahha! Be careful! That's a highly contagious plague!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Touch him, and you'll get it too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No! AaaG GHH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Get away from them!

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: It's his plague bullets!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WAHAHAHA! That's what they do!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if you try any funny business, I'll shoot you too!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 50 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
